description: Machine-readable geometric primitives for Mandala Computing. Maps octahedral states, fractal ring topology, and energy couplings to consumable data for cross-repo fieldlink.

fractal_ring_schema.description: At depth d, generate floor(PHI^(d+1)) cells at radius PHI^d, equally spaced in angle.

coupling.description: Coupling energy between neighbor cells based on octahedral state difference.

fret.description: Dipole interaction strength decays as inverse sixth power of distance.

metropolis.description: Metropolis-Hastings acceptance criterion for state transitions.

rosetta_hooks.description: Entry points for Rosetta-Shape-Core to translate mandala primitives into its shape language.

entity_references.SHAPE.OCTA: shapes/octahedron.json — 8 faces = 8 computational states = 8 sacred petals
entity_references.CONST.PHI: data/math_constants.json — golden ratio, Fibonacci eigenvalue scaling
entity_references.CAP.SEED_EXPANSION: Bloom engine capability — fractal ring expansion

shape_map.octahedron: SHAPE.OCTA — 8-face symmetric solid, maps to 8 computational states
shape_map.fractal_ring: Nested concentric rings with CONST.PHI-scaled radii
shape_map.coupling_edge: Weighted edge between neighbor cells, strength ~ 1/r^6
